channel.title: Chinese Zodiac on Feng Shui Guide - Your Complete Resource for Chinese Wisdom
channel.description: Recent content in Chinese Zodiac on Feng Shui Guide - Your Complete Resource for Chinese Wisdom

item.title: Chinese Zodiac Compatibility: Find Your Perfect Match
item.description: Discover Chinese Zodiac compatibility for love, friendship, and business. Learn which zodiac signs are your best matches and which relationships may need more work.

item.title: Chinese Zodiac Elements: How Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water Shape Your Destiny
item.description: Learn about the five Chinese Zodiac elements and how they influence your personality, relationships, and life path. Discover your element based on birth year.

item.title: Dragon Horoscope 2025: Navigate the Year of the Snake
item.description: Detailed 2025 horoscope for Dragon zodiac sign. Discover predictions for career, love, wealth, and health in the Year of the Snake.

item.title: Snake Horoscope 2025: Your Complete Year Ahead Guide
item.description: Discover what 2025, the Year of the Snake, has in store for you. Read detailed predictions for all 12 zodiac signs covering career, love, health, and wealth.

item.title: The 12 Chinese Zodiac Signs: Complete Guide to Your Animal Sign
item.description: Discover all 12 Chinese Zodiac animals, their personality traits, lucky numbers, colors, and compatibility. Find your zodiac sign and learn what it reveals about you.
